purpose: Use local language models as bounded quantitative-research assistants, then admit only deterministic causal factor programs after independent syntax, numerical, and financial review.

runtime.device_observation: Both local 8B models reported 100% GPU through ollama ps on the AMD host during generation.

models.role: factor proposer and one validator-feedback retry
finance-tuned proposer and independent factor critic

findings: One malformed failure_mode key made the response invalid JSON.
One expression referenced target_cross_asset_return_dispersion_15m_bps, which is not an available feature.
Two safe_div expressions omitted the mandatory positive floor argument.
The path-efficiency mean-reversion rationale did not match the proposed sign interaction.
One safe_div expression omitted the mandatory positive floor argument.
Five of six proposals were bare copies or trivial rescalings of existing features rather than new interactions.
Several expected-regime labels did not correspond to the stated mechanism.
All six failure modes were the literal text positive_floor rather than economic failure conditions.
Four expressions were effectively scalar rescalings of one raw feature.
The cross-asset flow expression divided by agreement, which becomes least stable when agreement is weak.
The critic accepted five of six constrained formulas.
It reversed the sign interpretation of conditional_mean_reversion_240m.
It reversed the sign interpretation of downside_asymmetry_60m.
Model acceptance therefore cannot replace deterministic dimensional and sign checks.

admitted_factor_programs.name: trend_quality_60m
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: Directional persistence should be more credible when the one-hour path is efficient rather than oscillatory.
admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Abrupt reversals after an efficient trend can invert the relation.

admitted_factor_programs.name: flow_confirmation_15m
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: A return accompanied by same-direction aggressive taker flow may be more persistent than an unconfirmed move.
admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Exhaustion, liquidation cascades, or informed passive liquidity can make aggressive flow contrarian.

admitted_factor_programs.name: conditional_mean_reversion_240m
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: An extreme return is more likely to mean-revert when the recent path is inefficient; positive values represent an oversold reversion signal.
admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Structural repricing and high-efficiency trends can make standardized extremes persist.

admitted_factor_programs.name: residual_risk_adjusted_60m
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: Beta-residual momentum scaled by recent volatility isolates asset-specific movement without allowing a near-zero denominator.
admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Unstable beta or a common shock not represented by the benchmark can contaminate the residual.

admitted_factor_programs.name: liquidity_conditioned_flow_5m
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: Aggressive flow observed in at least normal seasonal liquidity should be less vulnerable to a thin-market print than the same flow in poor liquidity.
admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Temporary volume spikes and liquidation flow can be liquid but non-persistent.

admitted_factor_programs.name: downside_asymmetry_60m
admitted_factor_programs.mechanism: Positive values identify recent upside-dominated variation; negative values identify downside-dominated variation on a bounded-like scale.
admitted_factor_programs.failure_mode: Semivolatility asymmetry can reflect a completed shock rather than continuation.

admission_decision.reason: The models identified useful factor families but did not produce a complete artifact that passed syntax and financial review. The admitted programs are deterministic, finite transforms whose incremental value must be established by a matched out-of-sample ablation.
